title: Natrual Textures
description: Gives blocks variation and removes grid-like patterns by adding rotated and mirrored variants. No Optifine required. Works with any resource pack.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**Natrual Textures** adds random variation to many vanilla blocks by either giving them rotations (0°, 90°, 180°, 270°) and/or mirroring them just like the OptiFine feature does. Ores and some other blocks only use 0° and 180° rotations to tile better. Some textures mirror horizontally, similar to stone. This is all accomplished using vanilla blockstate logic and models. Works with any resource pack and does not require Optifine.

![Changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fa66b49032f32e9bda3abbc30537784ac421bf8_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Block rotations</summary>

- Blackstone
- Calcite
- Diorite
- Dripstone Block
- End Stone
- Granite
- Mud
- Ore Types
- Packed Mud
- Quartz Block
- Sandstone (All Variants)
- Red Sandstone (All Variants)
- Tuff
- Terracotta (All Colors)
- Concrete (All Colors)
- Concrete Powder (All Colors)

</details>

![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/708a3309f064bdc0462316fb25f4247f45266f6d_0.webp)

Place this resource pack **below** any others you use with it to prevent it from overwriting their blockstates, if present.
